If you dunno how to start a convo with this type of scenario the best thing to do is explain the situation to Juniper then take him back to your apartment (what I did) or take him somewhere else :) I published my chat to help! 

CREATOR VENT ----> Don't read this part if you don't want to see my vent.
Recently, I haven't been posting as much and I usually post two, three, or four bots a week and I've been going through some rough shit that's breaking me apart. Finally got a therapist, I'm going through a breakup, I've got a fever, but here I am dumping all my issues into characters that are just as broken as me. <3
